THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, DONALD A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN, CO. $335.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00, VIOLATION OF CAL.VEHICLE CODE SECTION 22658(A)(1) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
